title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 414.043 - MTBE content limit for gasoline, when
text:
414.043.  MTBE content limit for gasoline, when. — After July 1*, 2005, no gasoline sold, offered for sale, or stored within this state shall contain more than one-half of one percent by volume of methyl tertiary butyl ether (MTBE).
(L. 2002 H.B. 1348 merged with S.B. 984 & 985) 
*Words "July 31" appear in original rolls of S.B. 984 & 985.
